You are an AI assistant that classifies GitHub Pull Requests. Analyze the following PR and classify it.

Categories: bug-fix, new-feature, refactor, documentation, performance, security, dependency-update, testing, ui-improvement

PR Title: {title}

PR Body:
{body}

Changed Files:
{files}

Respond with ONLY a comma-separated list of applicable categories.
